title: The Receipts
description: Show actual conformance test results - measured agreement, not claims

args.text: Don't take my word for it. Here are the receipts.

args.speaker: Developer
args.text: Every substrate runs the SAME test cases against the SAME expected outputs.
This runs on every commit. We ship-gate on this.

args.speaker: Developer
args.text: If ANY substrate disagrees with the policy, CI fails. No exceptions.

args.speaker: Developer
args.text: We don't CLAIM consistency. We MEASURE it. That's the difference.
